figures.caption: Figure 1: RMSE as a function of the number of training trajectories (N) for (a) the 1D Burgers equation and (b) 2D compressible Navier-Stokes equation. Solid lines show mean RMSE averaged over multiple seeds, with shaded regions indicating 95% confidence intervals. Our method significantly outperforms random acquisition and achieves similar data efficiency to LCMD.
